.bar-footer__func-item { margin-left: 20px; } .preview_bottom_bar .simple-progress { position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; width: 32px; height: 32px; margin-right: 8px; } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring { width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring::before { position: absolute; content: ""; background: var(--weui-BRAND-100); width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.1; } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring .progress-fill { position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--weui-BRAND-100); border-radius: 50%; clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 50% 0%, 50% 0%, 50% 0%, 50% 0%); animation: progress-animation 18s cubic-bezier(.5,0,.5,1) forwards var(--progress-delay, 3s); } .preview_bottom_bar .progress-ring::after { position: absolute; content: ""; width: calc(100% - 5.6px); height: calc(100% - 5.6px); background: var(--weui-BG-2); border-radius: 50%; } @keyframes progress-animation { 0% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 50% 0%); } 4.16% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 0%); } 8.3% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 50%, 100% 50%, 100% 50%, 100% 50%); } 10% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 62.94%, 100% 62.94%, 100% 62.94%, 100% 62.94%); } 50% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 95.24%, 100% 95.24%, 100% 95.24%, 100% 95.24%); } 50.35% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%, 100% 100%); } 53.35% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 50% 100%, 50% 100%, 50% 100%); } 56.34% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 100%); } 59.33% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 50%, 0% 50%); } 60% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 45.64%, 0% 45.64%); } 78.32% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 0%, 0% 0%); } 100% { clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 0%, 48.43% 0%); } } .preview_bottom_bar .complete .progress-ring .progress-fill { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; } .bar-data-analysis { width: fit-content; } .bar-data-analysis .analysis-link { padding-right: calc(0.67em + 2px); position: relative; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 21px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .bar-data-analysis .analysis-link::after { content: ""; display: block; position: absolute; top: 50%; right: 0px; transform: translateY(-50%); font-size: 10px; height: 2em; width: 1em; mask-image: url("https://res.wx.qq.com/t/components/icons/base/arrow_right_regular.svg"); background-color: currentcolor; mask-size: contain; mask-position: center center; mask-repeat: no-repeat; } .bar-data-analysis .read-num { margin-top: 2px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 17px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .jump-weixin-dialog .weui-dialog { border-radius: 8px; } .jump-weixin-dialog.is_moblie .weui-dialog__btn { padding: 20px 0px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog { width: 280px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog__hd { position: relative; padding: 40px 0px 0px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog__hd .weui-icon-close-thin { cursor: pointer; position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; height: 18px; width: 18px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .weui-dialog__bd { padding-top: 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .qrcode-con { position: relative; display: flex; margin: 16px auto 0px; justify-content: center; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_wx_qrcode_img { height: 120px; width: 120px; border-radius: 4px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_author_avatar_con { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); height: 25px; width: 25px; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 4px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_author_avatar { display: flex; height: 24px; width: 24px; } .jump_wx_qrcode_dialog .jump_wx_qrcode_desc { font-size: 16px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card { box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px 12px 12px; margin-bottom: 18px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); border-radius: 8px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__old-only { display: none; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card.novel-card--old { padding: 12px; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card.novel-card--old .novel-card__new-only { display: none; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card.novel-card--old .novel-card__old-only { display: block; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__left { display: flex; align-items: center; flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__cover { position: relative; width: 40px; height: 53px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; background-color: rgb(240, 240, 240); overflow: hidden; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__cover img { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; min-width: 0px; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__main { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 21px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); margin: 0px; word-break: break-word; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__subtitle { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 19.6px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin: 0px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-card__link { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 19.6px; color: var(--weui-LINK); white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group { display: flex; align-items: center; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-cover { position: relative; width: 33px; height: 44px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 8px; background-color: rgb(240, 240, 240); overflow: hidden; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-cover img { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-meta .novel-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .novel-info .novel-cover-group .novel-meta .novel-description { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .rich_media_wrp .novel-card .arrow-jump-icon { width: 10px; height: 20px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-2); mask-size: contain; mask-position: center center; mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='10' height='20' viewBox='0 0 12 24' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath fill-rule='evenodd' clip-rule='evenodd' d='M2.4541 6.58068L3.51476 5.52002L9.29366 11.2989C9.68378 11.689 9.68724 12.3181 9.29366 12.7117L3.51476 18.4906L2.4541 17.4299L7.87872 12.0053L2.4541 6.58068Z' fill='black'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .rich_media_wrp .novel-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02); } } mp-sponsor-ad iframe { min-height: 24px; margin-top: -24px; } .data_color_scheme_dark .icon_appmsg_tag { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark .icon_appmsg_tag.theme_tag { background: rgba(6, 174, 86, 0.1); color: rgb(37, 156, 92); } .data_color_scheme_dark .tips_global_primary.tips_global_primary { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_card_context { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_live_card { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_live_card .card_seperator_line { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_live_card .head_btn_offlive { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) !important; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .share_mod_context .share_mod_hd::before { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); } .data_color_scheme_dark .share_mod_context .account_avatar { background: transparent; } .data_color_scheme_dark .account_nickname { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_tool > .weui-flex + .weui-flex::before { border-top-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .data_color_scheme_dark .share_btn[disabled]::before { opacity: 0.1; } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary { background-color: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary .weui-loadmore_line { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); } .data_color_scheme_dark .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary .weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } .data_color_scheme_dark body { background-color: rgb(17, 17, 17); } .data_color_scheme_dark body a, .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_meta_link { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_content { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); } .data_color_scheme_dark .rich_media_meta_text, .data_color_scheme_dark .icon_appmsg_tag.default, .data_color_scheme_dark .reward_area_win .reward_user_tips .weui-loadmore__tips a, .data_color_scheme_dark .simple_pagination, .data_color_scheme_dark .sp_page_current, .data_color_scheme_dark blockquote, .data_color_scheme_dark .blockquote_info { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark blockquote { border-color: rgb(64, 64, 64); } .data_color_scheme_dark .img_loading { background-color: rgb(32, 32, 32) !important; border-color: rgb(32, 32, 32) !important; } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_nickname, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_panel_content, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_panel_title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_tips, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_desc, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_panel .original_account_nickname { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_card, .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_card_tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_dark .original_primary_card .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --appmsgExtra-BG: #121212; } } .wx-root, body { --new-title-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --new-title-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --new-title-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } } .wx-root, body { --new-content-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .7); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .7); } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body.appmsg_content_new_ui { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .55); } } .data_color_scheme_light .icon_appmsg_tag { background-color: rgb(195, 195, 195); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .data_color_scheme_light .icon_appmsg_tag.appmsg_title_tag { background: rgb(237, 237, 237); color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light .tips_global_primary.tips_global_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light .appmsg_card_context { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); } .data_color_scheme_light .appmsg_skin_default .rich_media_area_primary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .data_color_scheme_light body:not(.my_comment_empty_data) { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .data_color_scheme_light body:not(.my_comment_empty_data) a:not(.reward_button) { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .data_color_scheme_light body:not(.my_comment_empty_data) .weui-audio-btn { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .data_color_scheme_light .rich_media_meta_link { color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .data_color_scheme_light .rich_media_content { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .data_color_scheme_light .rich_media_meta_text, .data_color_scheme_light .icon_appmsg_tag.default, .data_color_scheme_light .reward_area_win .reward_user_tips .weui-loadmore__tips a, .data_color_scheme_light .simple_pagination, .data_color_scheme_light .sp_page_current, .data_color_scheme_light blockquote, .data_color_scheme_light .blockquote_info { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light blockquote { border-color: rgb(219, 219, 219); } .data_color_scheme_light .img_loading { background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247) !important; border-color: rgb(247, 247, 247) !important; } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_nickname, .data_color_scheme_light .original_panel_content, .data_color_scheme_light .original_panel_title { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_tips, .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_desc, .data_color_scheme_light .original_panel .original_account_nickname { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_card, .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_card_tips { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .data_color_scheme_light .original_primary_card .weui-flex__ft::after { background-image: https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizappmsg/zh_CN/htmledition/js/assets/qqmail_tpl_vite_entry.mpf6as7932083ee8.css @charset "utf-8"; .pay__notice_new { border-top-width: medium; border-top-style: none; border-top-color: currentcolor; } .pay__notice_new .pay__intro-content .pay__notice-desc { white-space: normal; } .pay__notice_hiden { display: none; } .fade-enter-active[data-v-41e3de8a], .fade-leave-active[data-v-41e3de8a] { transition: opacity 0.3s; } .fade-enter[data-v-41e3de8a], .fade-leave-to[data-v-41e3de8a] { opacity: 0; } .novel-tips-trans-leave-active, .novel-tips-trans-enter-active { transition: 0.5s; } .novel-tips-trans-enter, .novel-tips-trans-leave-to { transform: translate3d(100%, 0px, 0px); } .novel-tips-bar { position: fixed; right: 0px; z-index: 4999; bottom: calc(var(--bottom-bar-gap, 16px) + var(--bottom-bar-height, 59px)); } .novel-tips-bar:not(.is-pc) { transition: none !important; } .novel-tips-bar.is-pc { right: auto; bottom: calc(var(--bottom-bar-gap, 16px) + var(--bottom-bar-height, 59px) + var(--pc-page-bottom-gap, 0px)); transition: none !important; } .novel-tips-bar.is-pc .keyword-con { border-radius: 999px; padding-left: 8px; } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con { --bg-color: #fff; --bottom-bar-gap: 16px; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; background-color: var(--bg-color); padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 999px 0px 0px 999px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 8px 25px; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--weui-LINK); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con { --bg-color: #2C2C2C; } } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con .novel-keyword { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; font-weight: 500; } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con.wx_tap_highlight_active { overflow: hidden; } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 100%; width: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con.wx_tap_highlight_active::after { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } } .novel-tips-bar .keyword-con .icon-more { margin-left: 4px; width: 8px; height: 16px; background-color: currentcolor; mask-size: contain; mask-position: center center; mask-image: .audio-panel__header[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: relative; display: flex; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .audio-panel__header.border[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .audio-panel__header.border[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); } } .audio-panel__header-close[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: absolute; font-size: 24px; width: 1em; height: 1em; top: 20px; left: 16px; } .audio-panel__header-close .icon-close[data-v-249ec9a9] { width: 100%; height: 100%; } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: var(--weui-FG-0); overflow: hidden; z-index: 50; } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp .audio-panel__playing-bar[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 57%; word-break: break-all; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp.mask .audio-panel__playing-bar[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 100%; width: 45px; background: linear-gradient(to left, rgb(255, 255, 255) 5%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp.mask .audio-panel__playing-bar[data-v-249ec9a9]::after { background: linear-gradient(to left, rgb(25, 25, 25) 5%, rgba(25, 25, 25, 0)); } } .audio-panel__playing-bar-wrp.ghost[data-v-249ec9a9] { position: absolute; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: relative; width: 100%; margin: 16px auto 0px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: relative; width: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); height: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; margin: 6px 0px; transition: height 0.1s linear, margin 0.1s linear, transform 0.1s linear; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: var(--percent); height: 100%; background-color: rgb(23, 23, 23); border-radius: 9999px; transition: height 0.1s linear; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::before { background-color: rgb(209, 209, 209); } } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 50%; left: var(--percent); width: 8px; height: 8px; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 9999px; background-color: rgb(23, 23, 23); transition: width 0.1s linear, height 0.1s linear; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-de6e99d8]::after { background-color: rgb(209, 209, 209); } } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar.active[data-v-de6e99d8] { height: 6px; margin: 2px 0px; transform: translateY(-2px); } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar.active[data-v-de6e99d8]::after { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-active-area[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: absolute; top: -16px; left: 0px; height: 32px; width: 100%; background: transparent; z-index: 1; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__time-info[data-v-de6e99d8] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; transition: color 0.1s linear; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__time-info.active[data-v-de6e99d8] { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .card-item__btn-wrp[data-v-de6e99d8] { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; width: 100%; margin-top: 20px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group[data-v-de6e99d8] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; color: var(--weui-FG); } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group[data-v-de6e99d8], .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.shutdown-group[data-v-de6e99d8], .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.listen-later-group[data-v-de6e99d8] { flex-shrink: 1; position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); min-width: 0px; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.left[data-v-de6e99d8] { left: 0px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.right[data-v-de6e99d8] { right: 0px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group[data-v-de6e99d8] { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group .card-item__btn-playback-rate.wx_tap_highlight_active[data-v-de6e99d8] { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .card-item__btn-wrp align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-2); line-height: 1.4; text-align: center; } .audio-panel__info-area > [data-v-f7e10856]:not(:first-child) { margin-top: 4px; } .audio-panel__operate-area-wrp[data-v-f7e10856] { position: relative; width: 100%; } .card-item__operate-area[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: -14px; padding-bottom: 28px; } .audio-panel__operate-area[data-v-f7e10856] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in-out, padding-bottom 0.3s ease-in-out, padding-top 0.3s ease-in-out; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; padding-top: 8px; padding-bottom: 48px; } .audio-panel__operate-area.fold[data-v-f7e10856] { max-height: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn[data-v-f7e10856] { flex-shrink: 1; flex-grow: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; min-width: 0px; background: var(--weui-FG-5); color: var(--weui-FG-0); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 0px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn i[data-v-f7e10856] { flex-shrink: 0; flex-grow: 0; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 20px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn i.weui-loading[data-v-f7e10856] { background-size: contain; height: 0.8em; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn span[data-v-f7e10856] { flex-grow: 0; flex-shrink: 0; display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap; margin-left: 4px; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn[data-v-f7e10856]:not(:first-child) { margin-left: 16px; } .audio-panel__operate-area .operate-btn.wx_tap_highlight_active[data-v-f7e10856] { background: var(--weui-FG-4); } .audio-panel__operate-area.small .operate-btn[data-v-f7e10856] { padding: 10px 0px; border-radius: 6px; } .audio-panel__operate-area.small .operate-btn i[data-v-f7e10856] { font-size: 16px; } .audio-panel__operate-area.small .operate-btn span[data-v-f7e10856] { font-size: 14px; } .audio-panel__list-area[data-v-f7e10856] { width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; transition: max-height 0.3s ease-in-out; padding-bottom: 48px; } .audio-panel__list-area.version2[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: 0px; } .audio-panel__list-area.fold[data-v-f7e10856] { max-height: 0px; } .audio-panel__list-area .sub-title[data-v-f7e10856] { display: block; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin-bottom: 8px; padding-left: 24px; padding-right: 24px; width: 100%; } .audio-panel__top-anime-area[data-v-f7e10856] { position: fixed; top: var(--top-anime-top); left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, 100%); padding: 12px 18px; background: var(--weui-BG-2); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 0 25px var(--weui-SEPARATOR-0); z-index: 100; width: calc(100% - 24px); } .audio-panel__top-anime-area > [data-v-f7e10856] { display: block; width: 100%; line-height: 1.4; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; } .audio-panel__top-anime-area .title[data-v-f7e10856] { color: var(--weui-FG-0); font-size: 12.75px; } .audio-panel__top-anime-area .desc[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: 2px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 10.5px; } .audio-panel__modal-bottom-mask[data-v-f7e10856] { position: fixed; left: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 100vw; height: env(safe-area-inset-bottom); z-index: 11; } .audio-list__item-slide-wrp[data-v-f7e10856]:not(.sortable-drag):not(.sortable-chosen):not(.disable-transition) { transition: opacity 0.2s ease-in, transform 0.3s ease-out, position 0.3s ease-out; } .audio-list-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856], .audio-list-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { margin-top: 0px; } .audio-list-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { position: absolute; width: 100%; } .audio-list-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .audio-list-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .now-playing[data-v-f7e10856] { z-index: 10; } .operate-fade-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .operate-fade-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .operate-fade-enter-to[data-v-f7e10856], .operate-fade-leave[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 1; } .operate-fade-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 1, 0); position: absolute; top: 0px; } .operate-fade-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.5, 1, 0, 1); } .top-anime-enter[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .top-anime-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: transform 0.15s linear, opacity 0.15s linear; } .top-anime-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transform-origin: center center; transition: transform 0.3s ease-in, top 0.3s ease-in; } .top-anime-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { top: var(--top-anime-top-end); transform: translate(-50%, 100%) scale(0.07); } .slide-in-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .slide-in-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { transform: translateY(-100%); } .slide-in-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856], .slide-in-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: transform 0.15s linear; } .slide-in-enter-to[data-v-f7e10856], .slide-in-leave[data-v-f7e10856] { transform: translateY(0px); } .fade-enter[data-v-f7e10856], .fade-leave-to[data-v-f7e10856] { opacity: 0; } .fade-enter-active[data-v-f7e10856], .fade-leave-active[data-v-f7e10856] { transition: rotate(0deg); } } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp[data-v-03413efa] { position: relative; width: 100%; margin-top: 16px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-03413efa] { position: relative; width: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); height: 1px; border-radius: 9999px; margin: 4px 0px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-03413efa]::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: var(--percent); height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-FG); } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar[data-v-03413efa]::after { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 0px; left: var(--percent); width: 8px; height: 8px; transform: translate(-50%, calc(-50% + 1px)); border-radius: 9999px; background-color: var(--weui-FG); transition: width 0.1s linear, height 0.1s linear; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-bar.active[data-v-03413efa]::after { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__progress-active-area[data-v-03413efa] { position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 0px; height: 20px; width: 100%; background: transparent; z-index: 1; } .card-item__progress-bar-wrp .card-item__time-info[data-v-03413efa] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; } .card-item__btn-wrp[data-v-03413efa] { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group[data-v-03413efa] { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center; color: var(--weui-FG); } transform: translateY(-50%); min-width: 0px; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden; } .card-item__btn-wrp .card-item__btn-group.rate-group[data-v-03413efa] { left: 0px; font-size: 14px; color: txp_barrage { 0% { transform: translate(0px); opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-2800px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes txp_barrage { 0% { transform: translate(0px); opacity: 1; } 90% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-2800px); opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_plusone { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(-40px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_plusone { 0% { transform: translateY(0px); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translateY(-40px); opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_star { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); } 50% { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn) scale(1); } } @keyframes txp_barrage_star { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1); } 50% { transform: rotate(180deg) scale(1.1); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn) scale(1); } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_item_star_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_item_star_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_item_star { 0% { top: 200px; } 100% { top: 15px; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_item_star { 0% { top: 200px; } 100% { top: 15px; } } @keyframes txp_barrage_item_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 5% { opacity: 1; } 95% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } @-webkit-keyframes txp_barrage_item_show { 0% { opacity: 0; } 5% { opacity: 1; } 95% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } .page_video .txp_barrage { z-index: 3; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: translateZ(0px); text-overflow: ellipsis; pointer-events: none; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item { stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; padding: 4px; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.01); font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 1px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 1px; white-space: nowrap; pointer-events: auto; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; width: fit-content; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_text { display: inline-block; max-width: 680px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_img { display: inline-block; width: auto; height: 28px; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_barrage_content { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bottom, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top { stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 50%; width: auto; padding: 4px; transform: translate(-50%); backface-visibility: hidden; font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; text-align: center; text-shadow: rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 1px; white-space: nowrap; opacity: 0; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bottom.txp_animate, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top.txp_animate { animation: 5s ease 0s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_item_show; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top { top: paused; } .page_video .txp_barrage_plusone { position: absolute; top: -20px; right: 10px; color: rgb(255, 66, 0); font-size: 20px; animation: 1s linear 0s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_plusone; } .page_video .txp_barrage_emotion { display: inline-block; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 2px; vertical-align: -3px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_report { z-index: 999; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 80px; height: 30px; border-radius: 15px; background-color: rgba(55, 55, 66, 0.95); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 14px; line-height: 30px; text-align: center; } .page_video .txp_barrage_report:hover { color: rgb(255, 146, 11); } .page_video .txp_barrage_report:hover .txp_svg_icon_report { fill: rgb(255, 146, 11); } .page_video .txp_svg_icon_report { fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 20px; height: 20px; margin-top: 7px; vertical-align: top; pointer-events: none; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bubble { padding: 4px 50px 4px 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); border-radius: 20px; background-position: 100% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: contain !important; } .page_video .txp_player_live .txp_barrage_item_bubble { padding-right: 10px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_vipicon { position: absolute; top: 19px; left: 15px; height: 13px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_mine { z-index: 1; width: auto; padding: 4px 6px 4px 4px; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_avatar, .page_video .txp_barrage_emoji { display: inline-block; position: relative; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 6px; border-radius: 100%; vertical-align: top; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_emoji { margin: 0px 1px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_badge, .page_video .txp_barrage_text { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; } .page_video .txp_barrage_badge { margin-left: 4px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_badge .txp_icon_text { display: inline-block; margin-left: 3px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv1 { color: rgb(255, 66, 0); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv2 { color: rgb(255, 120, 0); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv3 { color: rgb(237, 200, 141); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv4 { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .txp_barrage_lv5 { color: rgb(55, 165, 228); } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_mine.txp_barrage_item_bubble { padding: 4px 50px 4px 4px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star { z-index: 2; position: absolute; left: 50%; width: auto; transform: translate(-50%); animation: 0.2s ease 0s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_item_star_show, 0.4s linear 0.1s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_item_star; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star .txp_barrage_avatar { z-index: 3; position: absolute; top: -1px; left: 0px; width: 36px; height: 36px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star .txp_barrage_star { z-index: 2; position: absolute; top: -16px; left: -12px; width: 60px; height: 60px; transform-origin: 30px 32px; background: url("/tencentvideo/txp/style/img/avatar_star.svg") 0px 0px no-repeat; animation: 0.6s linear 0.4s 1 normal both running txp_barrage_star; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_star .txp_barrage_content { display: inline-block; z-index: 1; position: relative; padding: 4px 15px 4px 50px; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 204, 2); border-radius: 20px; backface-visibility: hidden; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); font-size: 20px; line-height: 24px; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 1px; white-space: nowrap; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_img { display: none; z-index: -1; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; pointer-events: auto; } .page_video .txp_html_fullscreen .txp_barrage_item_star { margin-top: 40px; } .page_video .txp_html_fullscreen .txp_barrage { overflow: hidden; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_prop { z-index: 1; width: auto; padding: 2px 58px 2px 2px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 92, 56, 0.6); border-radius: 20px; background-color: rgba(255, 92, 56, 0.4); } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_prop .txp_prop_img { position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 10px; width: auto; height: 30px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: visible; background: 0px center / auto 100% repeat-x; pointer-events: none; } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate.animated { background-image: url("/tencentvideo/txp/style/img/apng/stars.png"); } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate_pendant { position: absolute; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 10px; height: 10px; margin: auto; } .page_video .txp_barrage_animate_pendant .pic { display: block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; } .page_video .animated .txp_barrage_animate_pendant1 { animation: 10s linear 0s infinite normal none running txp_barrage_pendant1; } .page_video .animated .txp_barrage_animate_pendant2 { animation: 10s linear 0s infinite normal none running txp_barrage_pendant2; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_v2 { padding: 6px 4px 6px 50px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_v2 .txp_barrage_avatar { position: absolute; top: -2px; left: 5px; width: 40px; height: 40px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item_v2.txp_barrage_item_mine { padding-right: 6px; } .page_video .txp_barrage_item .txp_text.txp_gradation, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_bottom .txp_text.txp_gradation, .page_video .txp_barrage_item_top .txp_text.txp_gradation { font-weight: 700; } @media (max-width: 1269px) { .page_video .txp_mod_barrage .txp_barrage_input_box { width: calc(100% - 70px); } .page_video .txp_mod_barrage .stars_pendant_avatar, .page_video .txp_mod_barrage .stars_pendant_name { max-width: 34px; } } .mpad_more { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 6px; position: relative; top: -1px; width: 16px; height: 12px; left: 0px; } .mpad_more::before { content: " "; display: block; width: 12px; height: z-index: 11; min-width: 74px; list-style-type: none; max-width: initial !important; } .mpad_more_list::before { content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; border: 1px solid rgb(225, 225, 225); width: 200%; height: 200%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: scale(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 0px; z-index: -1; } .mpad_more_list_ele { position: relative; } .mpad_more_list_ele:last-child .mpad_more_list_ele_container::after { display: none; } .mpad_more_list_ele:last-child::before { display: none; } .mpad_more_list_ele_container { cursor: auto; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; position: relative; display: block; height: 30px; line-height: 30px; width: 100%; text-align: center; z-index: 2; font-size: 14px; box-sizing: content-box; } .mpad_more_list_ele_container:active { background-color: rgb(236, 236, 236); } .mpad_more_list_ele_container::after { display: block; content: " "; position: absolute; .weui-icon-back-arrow, .weui-icon-back-arrow-thin, .weui-icon-back, .weui-icon-back-circle { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg { width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg.weui-icon-warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-icon_msg.weui-icon_msg.weui-icon-info-circle { color: var(--weui-BLUE); } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary { width: 6.4em; height: 6.4em; } .weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon_msg-primary.weui-icon-warn { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .weui-flex { display: flex; } .weui-flex__item { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .weui-media-box { padding: 16px; position: relative; } .weui-media-box::before { content: " "; position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); color: var(--weui-FG-3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.5); left: 16px; } .weui-media-box:first-child::before { display: none; } a.weui-media-box { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } a.weui-media-box:active { background-color: var(--weui-BG-COLOR-ACTIVE); } .weui-media-box__title { display: block; font-weight: 400; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-media-box__desc { color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; padding-top: 4px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-media-box__info { display: block; margin-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); line-height: 1em; list-style: none; overflow: hidden; } .weui-media-box__info__meta { float: left; padding-right: 1em; } .weui-media-box__info__meta_extra { padding-left: 1em; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-2); } .weui-media-box_appmsg { display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__hd { margin-right: 16px; width: 60px; height: 60px; line-height: 60px; text-align: center; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__thumb { width: 100%; max-height: 100%; vertical-align: top; } .weui-media-box_appmsg .weui-media-box__bd { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg { padding: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg .weui-cells { margin-top: 0px; } .weui-media-box_small-appmsg .weui-cells::before { display: none; } .weui-link { color: var(--weui-LINK); -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-link:visited { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-link:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-btn { position: relative; display: block; min-width: 184px; max-width: 280px; width: fit-content; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; padding: 12px 24px; box-sizing: border-box; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 1.41176; border-radius: 8px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); cursor: default; user-select: none; } .weui-btn:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK); border-radius: 8px; } .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_loading::before, .weui-btn:active.weui-btn_disabled::before, .weui-btn:active[disabled]::before { display: none; } .weui-btn__inner { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-btn_block { width: auto; } .weui-btn_inline { display: inline-block; } .weui-btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-0); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-btn_primary { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_warn { background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_primary:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_default:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: var(--weui-RED-100); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_warn:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .weui-btn_overlay.weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn_overlay[disabled] { color: rgba(247, 247, 247, 0.3); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .weui-btn_disabled, .weui-btn[disabled] { color: var(--weui-FG-4); background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-mask-loading.weui-mask-loading_only { margin-right: 0px; } .weui-btn_loading.weui-btn_default .weui-mask-loading { color: rgb(96, 96, 96); } .weui-btn_loading .weui-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-primary-loading { font-size: 20px; margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; vertical-align: middle; color: currentcolor; } .weui-btn_loading .weui-primary-loading::before { content: ""; } .weui-btn_cell { position: relative; display: block; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 17px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 1.41176; padding: 16px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); overflow: hidden; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); } .weui-btn_cell + .weui-btn_cell { margin-top: 16px; } .weui-btn_cell:active { background-color: var(--weui-BG-COLOR-ACTIVE); } .weui-btn_cell__icon { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin: -0.2em 0.34em 0px 0px; } .weui-btn_cell-default { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-btn_cell-primary { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-btn_cell-warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__content { min-height: 0px; flex: 1 1 0%; padding-bottom: 80px; box-sizing: border-box; overflow-y: auto; } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool { padding: 16px calc(32px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) calc(32px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: relative; z-index: 50; } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before { content: ""; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(255, 255, 255), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0)); position: absolute; bottom: calc(100% - 1px); left: 0px; right: 0px; transform: translateZ(0px); pointer-events: none; } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool, body[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool { background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool, body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool { background: rgb(25, 25, 25); } } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before, body[data-weui-theme="dark"] .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(25, 25, 25), rgba(25, 25, 25, 0)); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before, body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tool::before { background: linear-gradient(to top, rgb(25, 25, 25), rgba(25, 25, 25, 0)); } } .weui-bottom-fixed-opr-page__tips { margin-bottom: 24px; padding: 0px 32px; text-align: center; } middle; color: rgb(96, 96, 96); animation: 1s steps(60) 0s infinite normal none running circleLoading; } .weui-primary-loading__dot { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; margin-left: -0.04375em; .wx-root { --weui-BG-6: rgba(0, 0, 0, .05); --weui-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(0, 0, 0, .05); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --weui-BG-6: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); --weui-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-BG-6: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); --weui-ACTIVE-MASK: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } } .weui-dialog { position: fixed; z-index: 5000; top: 50%; left: 16px; right: 16px; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); text-align: center; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-height: 90%; outline: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .weui-dialog__hd { padding: 32px 24px 16px; } .weui-dialog__title { font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-dialog__bd { overflow-y: auto; padding: 0px 24px; margin-bottom: 32px; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { min-height: 40px; padding: 32px 24px 0px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-0); display: flex; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .weui-dialog__ft { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-dialog__ft::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); color: var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .weui-dialog__btn { flex: 1 1 0%; display: block; line-height: 1.41176; padding: 20px 8px; font-size: 17px; color: var(--weui-LINK); font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .weui-dialog__btn:active { background-color: var(--weui-BG-COLOR-ACTIVE); } .weui-dialog__btn::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 1px; bottom: 0px; border-left: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); color: var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transform: scaleX(0.5); } .weui-dialog__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-dialog__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } .weui-dialog__btn_warn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .weui-dialog__btn_disabled { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__ft { flex-direction: column; align-items: initial; } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__btn::after { width: auto; bottom: auto; right: 0px; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR); border-left: 0px; } .weui-dialog_btn-wrap .weui-dialog__btn:first-child::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog { text-align: left; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 6px 30px; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__title { font-size: 22px; line-height: 1.4; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__hd { text-align: left; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__bd { color: var(--weui-FG-1); text-align: left; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__bd:first-child { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__ft { display: block; text-align: right; line-height: 40px; min-height: 40px; padding: 0px 24px 16px; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__ft::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn { display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; padding: 0px 0.8em; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn::after { display: none; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn:last-child { margin-right: -0.8em; } .weui-skin_android .weui-dialog__btn_default { color: var(--weui-FG-HALF); } @media screen and (min-width: 352px) { .weui-dialog { width: 320px; margin: 0px auto; } } .weui-toast { position: fixed; z-index: 5500; min-width: 132px; max-width: 320px; padding: 28px 20px; top: 40%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); text-align: center; border-radius: 8px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: var(--weui-BG-4); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 8px 25px); box-sizing: border-box; line-height: 1.4; } .weui-toast__wrp { z-index: 5500; position: fixed; inset: 0px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .weui-toast__wrp .weui-toast { position: static; transform: none; margin-top: -10%; } .weui-toast_text { padding: 12px 20px; min-width: 0px; min-height: 0px; } .weui-icon_toast { display: block; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon_toast { width: 4em; height: 4em; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon-success-no-circle, .weui-icon_toast.weui-icon-warn { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .weui-icon_toast.weui-loading { width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 40px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading { display: flex; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 40px; color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading::before { border-width: 4px 0px 4px 4px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading::after { border-width: 4px 4px 4px 0px; } .weui-icon_toast.weui-primary-loading .weui-primary-loading__dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; } .weui-toast__content { font-size: 14px; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; max-width: 100%; } .weui-mask { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .weui-mask_transparent { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; } @keyframes weuiSlideUp { 0% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); } 100% { transform: translateZ(0px); } } .weui-animate_slide-up, .weui-animate-slide-up { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiSlideUp; } @keyframes weuiSlideDown { 0% { transform: translateZ(0px); } 100% { transform: translate3d(0px, 100%, 0px); } } .weui-animate_slide-down, .weui-animate-slide-down { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiSlideDown; } @keyframes weuiFadeIn { 0% { opacity: 0; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } .weui-animate_fade-in, .weui-animate-fade-in { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiFadeIn; } @keyframes weuiFadeOut { 0% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } .weui-animate_fade-out, .weui-animate-fade-out { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running weuiFadeOut; } .weui-transition.weui-mask { transition: opacity 0.3s, visibility 0.3s; opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; } .weui-transition.weui-half-screen-dialog { transition: transform 0.3s; transform: translateY(100%); } .weui-transition_show.weui-mask { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; } .weui-transition_show.weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: translateY(0px); } .weui-loadmore { width: 65%; margin: 20px auto; text-align: center; font-size: 0px; } .weui-loadmore .weui-loading, .weui-loadmore .weui-primary-loading { margin-right: 8px; } .weui-loadmore__tips { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .weui-loadmore_line { border-top: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-3); margin-top: 32px; } .weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { position: relative; top: -0.9em; padding: 0px 8px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips::before { content: " "; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); display: inline-block; position: relative; vertical-align: 0px; top: -0.16em; } body .weui-loadmore .weui-loadmore__tips { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } body .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { padding: 0px 8px; } body .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_dot { width: 68px; } body .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips { padding: 0px 8px; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore { width: auto; line-height: 1.4; margin: 0px 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; border: 0px; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::before, body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::after { content: ""; width: 24px; height: 1px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { top: auto; padding: 0px 8px; background: transparent; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); line-height: inherit; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_dot { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; } body .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_dot .weui-loadmore__tips { line-height: 0.5; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::before, body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line::after { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .weui-loadmore_default.weui-loadmore_line .weui-loadmore__tips { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } } .weui-pop-zindex-primary inline-flex; } body .weui-toast_text .weui-icon_toast { display: none; } body .weui-toast_active:active::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--weui-FG-3); z-index: -1; } body .weui-toast_bottom { user-select: none; width: auto; height: auto; top: auto; left: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); right: calc(8px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); bottom: calc(63px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); transform: none; overflow: hidden; } body .weui-toast_bottom.weui-animate-slide-up { animation-name: bottomToastSlideUp; } body .weui-toast_bottom_new { user-select: none; width: auto; height: auto; max-width: none; top: auto; left: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); right: calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); bottom: calc(63px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); transform: none; overflow: hidden; } body .weui-toast_bottom_new.weui-animate-slide-up { animation-name: bottomToastSlideUp; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd, body .weui-toast_bottom__ft { display: flex; align-items: center; word-break: break-all; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd:not(.weui-flex__item), body .weui-toast_bottom__ft:not(.weui-flex__item) { max-width: 34%; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd:first-child:last-child, body .weui-toast_bottom__ft:first-child:last-child { max-width: none; } body .weui-toast_bottom__new_hd { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; line-height: 1.4; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd { text-align: left; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd .weui-toast_bottom__icon { flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 8px; } body .weui-toast_bottom__hd .weui-icon-success-no-circle { color: inherit; } body .weui-toast_bottom__ft { justify-content: flex-end; text-align: right; margin-left: 16px; } body .weui-toast_bottom__access-btn { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; text-align: right; } body .weui-toast_bottom__access-btn .weui-icon-arrow { flex-shrink: 0; color: currentcolor; margin-left: 4px; } @keyframes bottomToastSlideUp { 0% { transform: translate3d(0,calc(100% + 20px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)),0); } 100% { transform: translateZ(0px); } } .page_video ul, .page_video ol { padding-left: 0px; list-style-type: none; } .page_video fieldset, .page_video legend, .page_video textarea, .page_video input, .page_video button { padding: 0px; } .page_video button, .page_video input, .page_video select, .page_video textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: 100%; margin: 0px; } .page_video a img, .page_video fieldset { border: 0px; } .page_video a { text-decoration: none; } .top_screen_opr { z-index: 12; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 56px; right: 0px; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5), rgba(0, none; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-info { position: relative; flex: 1 1 0%; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-info::after { content: " "; position: absolute; left: 0px; bottom: -6px; right: 0px; height: 1px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transform-origin: 0px 100%; transform: scaleY(0.5); } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-title { margin-bottom: 14px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-list { margin-right: 0px; padding: 0px 4px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-item { float: none; width: 100%; } .video__relate-info::after { display: none; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-duration { display: flex; font-size: 12px; align-items: center; right: 4px; bottom: 2px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-duration::before { content: ""; position: relative; top: 1px; display: inline-block; width: 14px; height: 14px; margin-right: 2px; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='16' height='16' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cpath d='M5.556 2.88l5.887 margin-bottom: 0px; width: 142px; padding-bottom: 80px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 12px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-item__right { display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex-grow: 1; position: relative; padding: 4px 0px; } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-item__right::before { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -6px; left: 0px; right: 0px; display: block; height: 1px; transform: scaleY(0.5); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .video__relate.vertical_column .video__relate-view { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.28; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); 255, 255, 0.8); margin-bottom: 16px; line-height: 1.4; font-size: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .video__relate_right { display: flex; justify-content: float: left; width: 33.8%; flex-shrink: 0; } .video__relate-item:last-child { padding-right: 8px; } .video__relate-item-wrp { margin-right: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .video__relate-image { background-color: rgb(153, 153, 153); width: 100%; padding-bottom: 56%; border-radius: 4px; background-size: cover; background-position: center center; position: relative; margin-bottom: 8px; overflow: hidden; transform: scaleZ(1); } .video__relate-duration { position: absolute; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); right: 6px; bottom: 4px; font-size: 10px; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 0px 2px; } .video__relate-desc { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); line-height: 17px; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; text-overflow: ellipsis; font-size: 12px; padding: 0px 1px; } .video__relate-image-invisible { position: absolute; width: 100%; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate3d(-50%, -50%, 0px); } .video__relate-img-mask { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); } .video_tail_module { padding: 24px; } .video_tail_module .video__relate { background-color: transparent; padding: 20px 0px; } 66.04%; position: relative; left: -4px; margin-right: 0px; } .video__relate-more-wrp { width: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; } .video__relate-more { position: relative; width: 32%; padding-top: 32%; height: 0px; box-sizing: content-box; border-radius: 50%; background-color: .video_tail_module .video__relate-item:last-child { padding-right: 0px; } .video_tail_module .ad_area { display: none; } .video_tail_module.has_ad { padding-bottom: 0px; } .video_tail_module.has_ad .have_expand { display: none; } .video_tail_module.expand .video_tail_module__hd, .video_tail_module.has_ad .video_tail_module__hd { flex-flow: wrap; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; flex-grow: 0; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_wrp { justify-content: flex-end; width: auto; flex-grow: 0; flex-shrink: 0; margin: 0px; position: relative; top: 4px; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp { flex-direction: row; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item_wrp:last-child, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp:last-child { margin-left: 16px; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item { width: 28px; height: 28px; margin-bottom: 0px; margin-right: 4px; } .video_tail_module.expand .account_info_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .account_info_wrp { position: static; margin-bottom: 10px; } .video_tail_module.expand .ad_area, .video_tail_module.has_ad .ad_area { display: block; flex: 1 1 0%; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .video_tail_plugin { position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 13; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .video_tail_plugin .video_tail_module { position: static; z-index: auto; } .video_tail_plugin .has_ad .iframe_ad_container { display: block; height: 100%; } .add_bg_color .video_tail_module { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_wrp { align-items: flex-start; } .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp.like_item_wrp, .video_tail_module.has_ad .opr_item_wrp.share_item_wrp { display: none; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand { padding: 12px 16px; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half .account_avatar, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand .account_avatar { width: 28px; height: 28px; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half .account_name, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand .account_name { font-size: 16px; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half .have_expand, .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.expand .have_expand { display: none; } .video_tail_module.video_screen_half.has_ad { padding-bottom: 0px; } .video_tail_module.horizontal_full .video_tail_module .opr_item_wrp { margin-left: 68px; } .video_tail_module.horizontal_full .video_tail_module .recommend_item_wrp.opr_item_wrp:last-child { margin-left: 41.5px; padding-left: 36.5px; } .video_tail_module.expand .video-logo_icon::before { width: 14px; height: 11px; } .video_tail_module.expand .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp { margin-left: 20px; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .video_tail_module.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item { margin-right: 8px; } .video_tail_module.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item_text { display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } .video_tail_module.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item_text::after { position: static; margin-left: 3px; margin-top: initial; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full { padding: calc(64px + env(safe-area-inset-top)) calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) calc(30px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) calc(20px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .video_tail_module__hd { display: block; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_wrp { justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 23px; margin-top: 50px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_item_wrp { flex-direction: column; margin-left: 47px; justify-content: center; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp { margin-left: 29.5px; padding-left: 23.5px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .opr_item { margin-right: 0px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .recommend_item_wrp .opr_item { margin-right: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .have_expand { align-items: flex-start; margin-top: 30px; padding-top: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .have_expand .video__relate-item { width: 50%; margin-bottom: 20px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand .have_expand .video__relate { padding-top: 28px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_wrp { top: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp { margin-left: 35px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp:first-child { margin-left: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp:last-child { margin-left: 35px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp { position: relative; margin-left: 29.5px; padding-left: 26.5px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full .opr_item_wrp.recommend_item_wrp::before { content: " "; display: block; width: 1px; height: 20px; position: absolute; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transform: scaleX(0.5); left: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .video_tail_module__hd { align-items: flex-start; display: flex; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .opr_wrp { margin-top: 0px; top: 4px; margin-bottom: 0px; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .opr_item_wrp { flex-direction: row; } .video_tail_module.vertical_full.expand.has_ad .opr_item { margin-right: 4px; margin-bottom: 0px; } .appmsg_video .video_tail_module .account_info_wrp, .appmsg_video .video_tail_module .share_item_wrp { display: none; } .paster_store.paster_show .paster_store_container { right: 0px; } .paster_store .paster_store_container { position: relative; z-index: 1; right: -100%; transition: 0.25s; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.5; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-right: 8px; padding: 2px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); } .paster_store .paster_store_container::before { top: 0px; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 0; content: " "; display: block; border-radius: 4px; backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); } .paster_store .paster_store_main { position: relative; z-index: 2; display: flex; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } .paster_store .paster_store_avatar { display: block; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 3px 1px 1px 3px; margin-right: 6px; } .paster_store .paster_store_content { box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; .content_paster_for_android .paster_store .paster_store_container.opera { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .paster_content { display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; position: absolute; transition: 0.25s; margin-left: env(safe-area-inset-left); margin-right: env(safe-area-inset-right); } .paster_content, .paster_container { background-color: transparent; } .page_video.page_video_skin-vertical.page_video_control .paster_content { margin-bottom: 238px; } .page_video.page_video_skin-horizontal.page_video_control .paster_content { margin-bottom: calc(32px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .wx_no_click { pointer-events: none; } .db { display: block; } .tips_global_primary { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .reset_btn { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; background-color: transparent; border: 0px; font-family: inherit; color: inherit; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; } .reset_icon_btn { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); outline: 0px; border: 0px; font-family: inherit; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-size: 10px; } .weui-flex_align-center { align-items: center; } .weui-flex_justify-center { justify-content: center; } body { height: auto; } .page_video a { color: var(--weui-LINK); text-decoration: none; } .page_video .tips_global { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .page_video .tc { text-align: center; } .page_video .tr { text-align: right; } .page_video .line_wrp { line-height: 58px; color: var(--weui-LINK); } .page_video .none.page_video .none.page_video .none { display: none; } .page_video .clearfix::after { content: " "; display: block; clear: both; height: 0px; } .page_video .clearfix { zoom: 1; } body, html { appearance: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .wrp_pop_tips { width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 20; line-height: 100%; text-align: center; } .wrp_pop_tips .pop_tips { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0px; margin-top: -36px; display: inline-block; padding: 15px 0px; text-align: center; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 100%; } .wrp_pop_tips .pop_tips .error_code { display: block; font-style: normal; font-size: 12px; color: rgb(136, 136, 136); margin-top: 10px; } .wrp_load_failed { width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 20; line-height: 100%; text-align: center; } .wrp_load_failed .wrp_icon_info { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 100%; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; display: block; margin-left: -30px; margin-top: -50px; } .wrp_load_failed .wrp_icon_info::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; display: block; width: 50px; height: 50px; margin-left: -25px; margin-top: -25px; background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/video/icon_load_faild.png") 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; } .wrp_load_failed p { width: 100%; height: 60px; position: absolute; top: 50%; display: block; margin-top: 30px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video { position: relative; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); user-select: none; } .page_video.wx_video_status_initial .top_screen_opr { background: transparent; } .page_video .wrp_loading { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 8; } .page_video .wrp_loading .svg_loader { position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-left: -30px; margin-top: -30px; } .page_video .wrp_loading .mid_opr { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .page_video .wrp_loading.start_loading .mid_opr { width: 100%; height: 100%; inset: 0px; margin: 0px; border-radius: 0px; } .page_video .wrp_loading.start_loading .wx_video_loading { width: 40px; height: 40px; } 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; animation: 1s steps(60) 0ms infinite normal none running loading; top: 0px; left: 0px; margin: 0px; position: relative; } .page_video .mid_opr { width: 56px; height: 56px; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin-left: -28px; margin-top: -28px; z-index: 10; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); text-align: center; border-radius: 5px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .page_video .mid_opr .spinner { transform: scale(0.7); } .page_video .mid_opr .icon_mid_play { display: inline-block; width: 0px; height: 0px; margin-top: 25px; margin-left: 25px; border-width: 14px 25px; overflow: hidden; border-color: transparent transparent transparent rgb(255, 255, 255); border-style: dotted dotted dotted solid; } .page_video .mid_opr .icon_mid_speed_play { display: inline-block; width: 35px; height: 20px; margin-top: 27px; background: url("/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/images/icon/appmsg/video/icon_speed_play.png") 0px 0px / 100% no-repeat transparent; } .page_video .mid_opr .video_length { color: rgb(203, 203, 203); font-size: 12px; } .page_video .mid_opr .video_length .played_time { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 400; } .page_video .mid_opr .video_length em { margin: 0px 2px; } .page_video .mid_opr.fast_pre_next { width: 136px; height: 74px; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: -68px; margin-top: -37px; background: rgb(76, 76, 76); } .page_video .mid_opr.fast_pre_next .video_length { line-height: 1.4; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .page_video .mid_opr.fast_pre_next .video_length .played_time { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .page_video .mid_opr .video_processor_bar { position: relative; margin: 18px auto 12px; width: 96px; height: 4px; border-radius: 4px; text-align: left; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .page_video .mid_opr .processor_bar_inner { position: absolute; height: 4px; border-radius: 4px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); opacity: 0.9; } .page_video .mid_opr.next .icon_mid_speed_play { transform: rotate(180deg); } .page_video .full_screen_opr { z-index: 12; text-align: center; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); .page_video .video_opr .play_mode .pop_mode_select .clarity .clarity_item.current { color: rgb(9, 187, 7); } .page_video .video_opr .play_mode .pop_mode_select .icon_arrow_down { width: 0px; height:
